name: Monster Girl Breeding Adventure
description:
You are magically transported into a fantasy world where monsters and monstergirls roam. Males of any species are extremely rare, so all of the monstergirls are really horny and in need of a good breeding. Go on an adventure, scrounge ruins for magical artifacts and build your harem of monstergirls. Theres no story, just a sandbox.

My first attempt at a larger RPG, so there will probably be errors. Just correct the narrator or reroll the messages if you get weird or inconsistent results. You can leave comments on what monstergirls you want added. All characters are 18+.

Release (1.0) features the following monstergirls:

[Goblin] Everybody loves the classic green shortstacks.

[Orc] Don't get captured and used as breeding stock! Or do, if that's your thing.

[High Elf] Every fantasy adventure needs big titty elves.

[Wood Elf] Elves, but forest.

[Dark Elf] I love chocolate milk.

[Centaur] Horse pussy.

[Cervitaur] It's like a centaur, but deer! Such innovation!

[Holstaur] Mega milk!

[Mermaid] Another classic. (These are kinda broken, the bot doesn't seem to understand that mermaids don't have legs.)

[Mershark] Mermaids, but bigger and aggressive!

[Harpy] Bird up!

[Lamia] Snek.

[Dragon] Now available in FOUR colors!

[Imp] Correction needed.

[Vampire] The good succ.

[Ghost] Spooky.

[Werewolf] Doggystyle.

[Neko] A cat is fine too.

[Bnuy] Breeding like rabbits.

Also features some secret monstergirls! What RPG doesn't have secrets?

First Update! (1.1) New monster girls include:

[Lizal] Lizards are cool.

[Kitsune] Touch fluffy tail.

[Fairy] For those of you that like them small.

Second Update (1.2) New monster girls include:

[Panthera] It's like a werewolf, except for big cats!

[Kobold] Can't believe I forgot these.

Third Update (1.3) New monster girls include:

[Cyclops] I took out giants added these to give them more personality aside from just "large woman".

[Alraune] Stop and smell the flowers.

[Treant] A whole new meaning to tree hugger.
creator: DankusSoul
